text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the moment is almost upon us. Hehe, I can't
wait to see how this race will turn out.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I always aim to keep my usual composure.
Fretting won't lead to good results.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Though I hope you won't take that to mean that
I'm lacking drive.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The drive that propels me isn't meant to be seen.
It stays hidden, a quiet flame in my heart.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm fully prepared. All that remains is to calmly go
out there and win. ♪
